title: Smoky Creamy Garlic Stir-Fry
description: A date-night dutch dish featuring smoky flavors and a creamy garlic base that's vegetarian-friendly and suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: Sherry Sauce (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added depth of flavor and umami

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in heavy cream and sherry sauce (if using), reduce to simmer, then stir in fresh black pepper and sea salt.
Gently add sliced mushrooms and vegetable stock. Stir well to combine all ingredients, adjust seasoning as needed.
Simmer gently for about 5 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly.
Remove from heat and serve immediately over rice or noodles.
